hero.title: Aśahat ən ugiš
hero.lead: IATF erha i ad ijji sit wen raqqis, eɣran, addobat ijjuch n keyboard tolas ogdah id teknoloji tan tin alxidmat
support: I web accessibility, IATF itkal [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Aśuhu ən aśahat eqal deɣqanen atiwazayan fal musnat taśohet ən adakal ən adinat ən təmusnawen atiwafanen.

header.title: Aɣil ən asostanan ən aśahat ən ugiš

paragraphs: A fal ijrawan aɣafal n ijjuch fal website wen, alxer isaknin s e-mail:
items: awa id axdaman teknoloji tan, browser meɣ device, a fal ila derhan
report.footnote: War ilkem ad ektabu takardat n bug wan alxidmat. afissar ifnaz ijjit

paragraphs: Muchakil tan win ijjuch addoben ad ijjichan ta-ite daɣ repository n addinat i ad addoben afissar nasan
A fal report- n-ik ehay isalan n addinat iyyad, issikna awen daɣ mesaj
Site wen eqqal andarran tolas s ijjit eqqal a ehan iddikud n isalan iyyad addoben ad war imdachan alwaq wa id iknan afissar net
